LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LEAVITT MEDICAL ASSOCIATES OF CALIFORNIA, M.H.R. MEDICAL ASSOCIATES OF CALIFORNIA, BRADLEY KURGIS, D.O. AND LEAVITT MANAGEMENT GROUP'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY PROCEEDINGS-IMPROPER FORUM (REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE). ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT WAIVED THE RIGHT TO SEEK TO ENFORCE THE CLAUSE BY NOT ASSERTING IT WHEN THE TORT CLAIM WAS FILED. THE FACTS ALSO PROVIDE A BASIS FOR A FINDING OF EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL WITH RESPECT TO THE CONSENT TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT. COURT DECLINES TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF EXHIBIT A, ATTACHED TO "REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY PROCEEDINGS-IMPROPER FORUM". MR. ROBINSON IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LEAVITT MEDICAL ASSOCIATES OF CALIFORNIA, M.H.R. MEDICAL ASSOCIATES OF CALIFORNIA, BRADLEY KURGIS, D.O. AND LEAVITT MANAGEMENT GROUP'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY PROCEEDINGS-IMPROPER FORUM (REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE).
APPEARANCES: RUSSELL A. ROBINSON, ESQUIRE (415.255.0462) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. CYNTHIA SOLIMAN, ESQUIRE (ERICKSEN ARBUTHNOT, 415.362.7125) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT WAIVED THE RIGHT TO SEEK TO ENFORCE THE CLAUSE BY NOT ASSERTING IT WHEN THE TORT CLAIM WAS FILED. THE FACTS ALSO PROVIDE A BASIS FOR A FINDING OF EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL WITH RESPECT TO THE CONSENT TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT. COURT DECLINES TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF EXHIBIT A, ATTACHED TO "REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY PROCEEDINGS-IMPROPER FORUM". MR. ROBINSON IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
